statement: In every magma, Equation 1359 (`x = y * (((z * x) * z) * z)`) implies Equation 210 (`x = (x * (y * x)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0166
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z x) z) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x (op y x)) z)
